Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Credential offer deeplink
Expected Result: Wallet successfully validates and receives deeplink; Issuer returns credential offer

Action: Wallet retrieves issuer well-known configuration and collects token via pre-authorized code flow
Data:
- Well-known metadata endpoint
- Pre-authorized code
- Token endpoint request
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves issuer configuration and collects token

Action: Wallet attempts to request signed metadata using a non-existent random UUID tenant ID in issuer URI
Data:
- Modified issuer URI with random UUID (non-existent tenant ID)
- Token (JWT)
- GET request to issuer metadata endpoint
- Accept: application/jwt header
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 404 NOT FOUND; tenant ID does not exist
